assets.notes: Existing root procedural candidate. Technically valid RGBA PNG, but visually a minimal blocky placeholder and not suitable as final canonical art for the approved stylized 3D female Archer. Do not use shop-card mockup art as canonical source.

Only older V5 candidate references are documented. Exact file identity and commercial-use provenance are not locked, so treat the canonical Slime as missing until an original-project replacement is approved.

Existing root procedural candidate. Technically valid RGBA PNG, but visually a minimal blocky placeholder and not sufficient as final Stage 5 boss art. It may remain as a temporary runtime placeholder until a dedicated canonical Golem is approved.
Keep the existing Warden asset. It is not assigned to Map 1, but may be reused for a later map or mode after a separate design decision. Do not delete or auto-map it to Stage 5.
